required_cases.description: Pair with the representative OBD adapter, connect, and observe valid PID activity.
Power-cycle the OBD adapter and verify that the device reconnects.
Power-cycle the V1 while OBD is enabled and verify that the V1 reconnects.
Connect a representative proxy phone client.
Verify that proxy takeover stops OBD scan, connect, and active-client work.
Exit proxy mode and verify that OBD operation can recover.
Run a sustained representative OBD workload without a watchdog reset or panic.
Run a sustained representative proxy workload without a watchdog reset or panic.
